name: hermes-relay-for-chrome
description: Browser extension for Hermes Agent by Nous Research with page context, continuity, tracked pages, and AI handoff.

scripts.check:js: node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content/chat.js && node --check extension/popup/popup.js && node --check extension/sidepanel/sidepanel.js && node --check scripts/setup-local.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:manifest && npm run check:js && npm run test
